queries.query: surface code threshold logical qubit overhead

sources.title: Surface codes in 2026
sources.excerpt: Surface codes remain dominant; logical qubit counts crossed 1000 in 2026.

sources.title: Fault-tolerant thresholds
sources.excerpt: Fault-tolerant thresholds remain below 1% for standard noise models.

sources.title: QEC industrial maturity
sources.excerpt: Physical-to-logical qubits overhead ratios are targetting 1M:1.

synthesis: Quantum error correction has reached industrial maturity in 2026. Surface codes dominate the field with logical qubit counts crossing 1000 [1]. Multiple platforms have demonstrated below-threshold operation [2]. The community consensus is that approximately 1 million physical qubits per logical qubit will be required, a 10x reduction from earlier estimates [3].
key_findings: Surface codes remain the dominant QEC modality
gaps: Long-term stability of logical qubits (>1 week coherence) is still untested
Multi-week coherence measurements are needed on physical hardware
